description: Multiple directory traversal vulnerabilities in QuickTalk forum 1.3 allow remote attackers to include and execute arbitrary local files via a .. (dot dot) sequence in the lang parameter to (1) qtf_checkname.php, (2) qtf_j_birth.php, or (3) qtf_j_exists.php.
